Liberation News publishes an article claiming that the US and Israel seek to turn Lebanon into a vassal state, and that the Lebanese people are determined to maintain independence. The article lists five alleged lies about Lebanon's resistance.

An article highlights Victor Serge's literary work, including his novel 'The Case of Comrade Tulayev' and his autobiography 'Memoirs of a Revolutionary,' which focus on the Russian Revolution and early 20th century events.

The Intercept reported a divide among Democrats between those seeking to end all US weapons deals with Israel and those who want to allow some exceptions.

New York Governor Kathy Hochul conceded to a tax on second homes in New York City worth over $5 million. Socialists are pushing for further taxes on the wealthy.

Jacobin reports that dockworkers in Sweden and elsewhere have taken actions to protest Russia's war in Ukraine and Israel's war in Gaza, showing labor solidarity against both conflicts.

Common Dreams publishes an opinion piece criticizing a Pentagon prayer service led by Pete Hegseth, accusing him of quoting Tarantino as scripture and promoting Christian nationalism and war.

Dr. Jennifer Shuford, who led the measles response in Texas, has joined the leadership of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention under Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. The agency is grappling with internal departures and shifting vaccine guidance.

Tehran has tightened control over the Strait of Hormuz after accusing the US of breaching a deal, raising fears of renewed conflict.

Funding cuts have hit legal aid clinics for migrant youth as universities partner with immigration agencies, raising fears for students. The Trump administration order halts legal aid for migrant youth.

A Gaza resident reports that while bombing has slowed, Israel still controls every aspect of life in Gaza, but residents find small moments of joy as a form of resistance.

The Intercept reported that Maxine Waters, a crypto critic who could become Financial Services Committee chair, faces a primary opponent who received over two-thirds of campaign funds from crypto sources.
Macaristan'da Tisza partisi süper çoğunluk kazandı, yeni lider yolsuzlukla mücadele sözü verdi
Hungary's Tisza party wins supermajority, new leader vows anti-corruption drive

Jacobin · OCCRP
▸ sentez / synthesis
Péter Magyar'ın Tisza partisi Macaristan parlamentosunda üçte iki süper çoğunluk kazanarak Viktor Orbán'ın iktidarını sona erdirdi. Yeni lider, yolsuzluğu önlemek ve çalınan kamu fonlarını geri almak için denetim kurumları kurmayı planlıyor.
Péter Magyar's Tisza party won a two-thirds supermajority in Hungary's parliament, ending Viktor Orbán's rule. The incoming leader plans to establish watchdog agencies to combat corruption and recover stolen public funds.

BreakThrough News

BreakThrough News hosted a live discussion with Professor Mohammed Marandi on Iran's pressure for a Lebanon ceasefire, fragile US-Iran talks, and Tehran's regional strategy.
İran-Lübnan Ateşkesi Yürürlüğe Girdi; Hürmüz Boğazı Yeniden Açıldı
Iran-Lebanon Ceasefire Takes Effect; Strait of Hormuz Reopens
3 src · 6 it2026-04-17 20:52
BreakThrough News · DropSite News · Mondoweiss · DropSite News · DropSite News · DropSite News
▸ sentez / synthesis
Lübnan ile İsrail arasında 10 günlük ateşkes 17 Nisan'da yürürlüğe girerken, İran Hürmüz Boğazı'nın ateşkes süresince tamamen açık olduğunu duyurdu. Hizbullah Milletvekili İbrahim El-Musevi, grubun ateşkese saygı göstereceğini belirterek anlaşmada İran'ın rolünü vurguladı. Bu arada İsrail, güney Lübnan'a giden son köprüyü yıktı ve Gazze'de askeri operasyonlarına devam etti.
A 10-day ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel took effect on April 17, with Iran announcing the Strait of Hormuz is fully open for the ceasefire's duration. Hezbollah MP Ibrahim Al-Moussawi said the group will respect the truce, crediting Iran for the deal. Meanwhile, Israel destroyed the last bridge to southern Lebanon and continued military operations in Gaza.
Temsilci Khanna, yapay zekanın 'Epstein sınıfı' yarattığı endişelerine yanıt veriyor
Congressman Khanna responds to concerns about AI creating 'Epstein class'

▸ sentez / synthesis

The Real News Network reports on fears that AI is creating a new class of people above the law, similar to Jeffrey Epstein. Congressman Khanna responds to questions about power without consequences.

Federal bill would give oil companies immunity from climate lawsuits

Common Dreams reports that Republican lawmakers have introduced federal legislation that would grant oil and gas companies immunity from lawsuits holding them accountable for climate change. Eleven states and dozens of local governments have sued the industry.

Robert F. Kennedy Jr. refused to acknowledge that he called for 're-parenting' Black children in 2024, despite Democratic Rep. Terri Sewell insisting he made the statement.

Truthout reports that Israel killed nearly 100 people in Lebanon in the day leading up to a ceasefire. The Lebanese military has already reported violations of the ceasefire by Israel.

Aliya Rahman filed a claim against the Department of Homeland Security after being violently dragged from her car by ICE agents. She hopes to highlight tools that could make mass acts of racial violence seem too expensive.

On Palestinian Prisoners Day, activists and supporters demand the release of all Palestinians held by Israel. The day commemorates the history of Palestinian resistance against occupation.

Iran reopened the Strait of Hormuz following a truce between Israel and Lebanon. The Real News Network reports that Israel attacked Lebanon despite a purported US prohibition.

Office of Management and Budget head Russ Vought refused to provide financial estimates on Iran war costs. One policy expert estimates costs could exceed $1 trillion by the end of the war.

İsrail'in 'Kara Çarşamba' Katliamı Lübnanlı Aileleri DNA Testine Yöneltti
Israel's 'Black Wednesday' Massacre Leaves Lebanese Families Using DNA to Identify Remains
1 src · 1 it2026-04-17 13:57
The Intercept
▸ sentez / synthesis
The Intercept'e göre Lübnan'da, İsrail'in 'Kara Çarşamba' katliamı olarak anılan saldırısında enkaz altında kalan parçalanmış cesetleri teşhis etmek için benzeri görülmemiş bir DNA testi kampanyası yürütülüyor.
The Intercept reports that in Lebanon, an unprecedented campaign of DNA tests is being used to identify mangled bodies left trapped under rubble by Israel's blitz, referred to as 'Black Wednesday' massacre.

A resolution to limit military action against Iran failed in the U.S. House of Representatives by a single vote. Only one Democrat, Jared Golden, opposed the measure.

The head of the International Energy Agency warned that Europe has approximately six weeks of jet fuel supply remaining. He said war will soon force widespread flight cancellations.

The conflict in Sudan has entered its fourth year, with civilians facing violence and growing fuel shortages. Analyst Kholood Khair said both the RSF and SAF are attacking civilians to undermine calls for democracy.

Forty out of 47 Democratic senators voted to block arms sales to Israel, marking a historic shift in Democratic consensus on Israel aid. The measures, introduced by Senator Sanders, still failed to pass.

A new poll from Drop Site and Zeteo finds Democratic Senate voters in Michigan care more about limiting AIPAC's influence than Hasan Piker's.
Trump'ın Memphis suç timi 800'den fazla göçmeni tutukladı, çok azı şiddet suçlarından
Trump's Memphis crime task force arrested over 800 immigrants, few for violent crimes

ProPublica
▸ sentez / synthesis
ProPublica, Trump'ın Memphis Suç Timi'nin 800'den fazla göçmeni tutukladığını ancak tutuklamaların yalnızca %2'sinin şiddet suçlarından olduğunu bildiriyor.
ProPublica reports that Trump's Memphis Crime Task Force arrested over 800 immigrants, but only 2% of the arrests were for violent crimes.
Görev Dışı Phoenix Polisi, ICE Karşıtı Protestoda Şiddeti Kışkırtmaya Çalıştı
Off-Duty Phoenix Cop Tried to Incite Violence at Anti-ICE Protest
1 src · 1 it2026-04-15 08:11
The Intercept
▸ sentez / synthesis
Görev dışı bir Phoenix polis memurunun, bir lisedeki ICE karşıtı protestoda şiddeti kışkırtmaya çalıştığı iddia edildi. Memur, meslektaşlarına planının protestocuların kendisine saldırmasına izin verip onları tutuklatmak olduğunu söyledi.
An off-duty Phoenix police officer allegedly attempted to incite violence at a high school protest against ICE. The officer told colleagues his plan was to let protesters assault him so they could be arrested.
Swalwell'in Hızlı Çöküşü, Demokratların İstismar Hesap Verebilirliğinde Değişim Sinyali
Swalwell's Rapid Fallout Signals Democratic Shift on Abuse Accountability
1 src · 1 it2026-04-14 21:34
The Intercept
▸ sentez / synthesis
Eski Temsilci Eric Swalwell'in cinsel saldırı iddialarının ardından hızlı siyasi çöküşü, Demokratların Epstein davasından ders çıkardığını gösteriyor. The Intercept'e göre seçmenler artık istismar hesap verebilirliğini kilit bir seçim meselesi olarak görüyor.
Former Representative Eric Swalwell's rapid political collapse following sexual assault allegations suggests Democrats have learned from the Epstein case. The Intercept reports that voters now see accountability for abuse as a key electoral issue.

Congress Prepares to Reauthorize FISA Section 702 Amid Privacy Concerns

The Intercept · DropSite News
▸ sentez / synthesis
Kongre, Yabancı İstihbarat Gözetleme Yasası'nın (FISA) 702. maddesini yeniden yetkilendirmeye hazırlanıyor. The Intercept, Amerikalıların verilerini sıralamak için kullanılan yapay zeka korkuları nedeniyle taban muhalefetinin büyüdüğünü bildirirken, DropSite News yeniden yetkilendirmenin gündemde olduğunu belirtiyor.
Congress is preparing to reauthorize Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA). The Intercept reports grassroots opposition is growing due to fears about AI used to sort Americans' data, while DropSite News notes the reauthorization is on the agenda.

Colorado marijuana regulators have pledged to crack down on intoxicating hemp products. The announcement was reported by ProPublica.
ABD, İnsan Hakları Endişelerine Rağmen Latin Amerika'da Ölümcül Tekne Saldırılarına Devam Ediyor
US Continues Deadly Boat Strikes in Latin America Despite Human Rights Concerns
2 src · 2 it2026-04-14 18:41
The Real News Network · The Intercept
▸ sentez / synthesis
The Intercept'e göre ABD ordusu, Latin Amerika açıklarında sivil bir tekneye 50. saldırısını gerçekleştirdi. The Real News Network, Dışişleri Bakanlığı'nın bir insan hakları izleme kuruluşunu ölümcül tekne saldırısı kampanyasını görmezden gelmeye ittiğini, Pentagon yetkililerinin ise uyuşturucu kaçakçılarına karşı kara saldırılarını desteklediğini bildiriyor.
The US military has conducted its 50th strike on a civilian boat off Latin America, according to The Intercept. The Real News Network reports that the State Department pushed a human rights watchdog to ignore the deadly boat strike campaign, while Pentagon officials expressed support for strikes on land against drug traffickers.
İsrail Sabotaj İddiaları Ortasında ABD-İran Ateşkes Görüşmeleri Tıkandı
US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Stalled Amid Israeli Sabotage Claims
3 src · 6 it2026-04-14 17:49
DropSite News · The Real News Network · DropSite News · The Real News Network · Investig'Action · Investig'Action
▸ sentez / synthesis
Birden fazla kaynak, ABD-İran ateşkes müzakerelerinin tıkandığını ve İranlı yetkililerin İsrail'i sabotajla suçladığını bildiriyor. İran'ın üst düzey diplomatı, anlaşmaya 'kıl payı' kala Trump ekibinin görüşmeleri sabote ettiğini söyledi. Pakistan'daki görüşmeler anlaşmayla sonuçlanmadı. İsrail-Lübnan görüşmeleri saldırılar arasında devam ediyor.
Multiple sources report that US-Iran ceasefire negotiations are stalled, with Iranian officials accusing Israel of sabotage. Iran's top diplomat said the Trump team sabotaged talks when a deal was 'inches away'. Talks in Pakistan did not yield an agreement. Israel-Lebanon talks continue amid attacks.

Meta tightens censorship rules for mentioning 'Antifa' on Facebook and Instagram

The Intercept
▸ sentez / synthesis
The Intercept'e göre Meta'nın yeni kuralları, 'antifa' kelimesini 'içerik düzeyinde tehdit sinyalleri' ile birlikte kullanan kullanıcıları yasaklamasına veya yorumları bastırmasına olanak tanıyor.
Meta's new rules allow it to ban users or suppress comments that include the word 'antifa' alongside 'content-level threat signals,' according to The Intercept.

A ProPublica report found that while arrests at anti-ICE protests piled up, prosecutions crumbled. Many cases were dropped or resulted in minimal charges.

Prominent journalist Ahmed Shihab-Eldin has been in jail for six weeks in Kuwait and faces trial in a special tribunal, part of a wider crackdown on online speech in Gulf countries.

Investigative journalist and Democracy Now! host Amy Goodman, subject of a new documentary, discussed why independent media is needed now more than ever in an interview with The Intercept.

A Common Dreams commentary criticizes the Trump administration's Iran policy, describing it as a 'terrifying ridiculous spectacle' and accusing the media of 'sanewashing' the administration's actions.

Leaked documents reveal details of a secret mutual defense pact between Saudi Arabia and Pakistan, with U.S.-Iran talks in Islamabad putting the relationship in the spotlight.

David McIntosh, a contractor who returned from Gaza, said in his first interview that he witnessed Israeli soldiers firing on crowds of Palestinians seeking aid.

Liberation News reports that President Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, contradicting earlier claims that war was needed to prevent Iran from doing so, and leading to higher gas prices.

Liberation News reports that Da'Quain Johnson is the latest victim of police violence in Grand Rapids, where there have been 12 officer-involved shootings in the past four years.

Book Reveals Lack of Democracy in United Farm Workers Under Chavez
1 src · 1 it2026-04-13 18:10
The Real News Network
▸ sentez / synthesis
Frank Bardacke'nin Birleşik Çiftlik İşçileri sendikası tarihi, iç demokrasi eksikliğinin Cesar Chavez'e dokunulmazlık sağladığını ortaya koyuyor. The Real News Network, kitabın UFW'nin gerilemesinin nedenlerine ışık tuttuğunu bildiriyor.
Frank Bardacke's history of the United Farm Workers union reveals that a lack of internal democracy gave Cesar Chavez immunity. The Real News Network reports that the book opened many eyes to the reasons the UFW declined.

Şirketlerden biri DHS tarafından işten çıkarıldı ve Teksas'ta faaliyet göstermek için hiçbir zaman kaydolmadı.
Common Dreams reports that two companies contracted to build a new ICE detention center in Texas have a history of legal problems, regulatory violations, and deadly conditions. One company was fired by DHS and was never registered to operate in Texas.

The State Department told the Inter-American Commission on Human Rights that it lacks competence to review Trump's campaign of deadly boat strikes, according to The Intercept.

Hungarian voters ended 16 years of far-right rule by Viktor Orbán, electing an opposition government. The EU head said 'Europe has always chosen Hungary' and 'together, we are stronger'.

A report on Israel's prison regime states that there is one law for Israeli Jews and another for Palestinian Arabs, highlighting systemic inequality.

Eski Pittsburgh Üniversitesi öğrencisi Muhammed Ali, Filistin yanlısı bir protestoda bir polis memuruyla metal bariyer üzerinde kısa süreli bir çekişme nedeniyle üç ağır suçla karşı karşıya ve potansiyel olarak 34 yıl hapis cezası alabilir.
Former University of Pittsburgh student Muhammad Ali faces three felonies for a brief tug-of-war with an officer over a metal barrier during a pro-Palestine protest, potentially leading to 34 years in prison.

President Donald Trump posted an AI-generated image on social media depicting himself as a healing Jesus Christ-like figure. Common Dreams reports the image was previously shared by a MAGA zealot and is widely seen as absurd.

ProPublica reports on President Trump's effort to take over the midterm elections. The article details the administration's moves to influence the electoral process.

Foreign service officers fired in Elon Musk's workforce purge warn that the State Department is unable to help Americans stranded in the Middle East, according to The Intercept.

The Grayzone reports that six Palestine Action activists face a retrial after acquittal in February, and if convicted they could be sentenced as terrorists. The jury has not been informed of the terrorism designation.

ProPublica is investigating who has been impersonating one of its reporters. The article does not provide further details.

The Department of Justice is moving forward with a proposed settlement even though a judge expressed concern that it does not do enough to help victims. ProPublica reports on the case.
Amerika Birleşik Devletleri'nde 2006 Göçmen Hakları Yürüyüşlerinin Yıldönümü
Anniversary of 2006 Immigrant Rights Marches in the United States
1 src · 2 it2026-04-10 19:41
Liberation News · Liberation News
▸ sentez / synthesis
10 Nisan 2006'da, milyonlarca göçmen, 1 Mayıs 'Göçmensiz Bir Gün' genel grevi öncesinde modern tarihin en büyük protesto günlerinden birinde Amerika Birleşik Devletleri genelinde yürüdü. Yıldönümü Liberation News tarafından hem İngilizce hem de İspanyolca olarak anıldı.
On April 10, 2006, millions of immigrants marched across the United States in one of the largest days of protest in modern history, leading up to the May 1 'Day Without An Immigrant' general strike. The anniversary was noted by Liberation News in both English and Spanish.
Meksika evrensel sağlık hizmetini yasalaştırırken ABD ters yönde ilerliyor, savunucu diyor

Medicare for All advocate Wendell Potter said it is both inspiring and frustrating to see other nations advance public healthcare while the US dismantles its own.

A report states that $4,049 of the average US taxpayer's bill last year went to war and weaponry, with critics saying tax dollars are used to bomb children abroad rather than feed and educate children at home.

Residents and activists in rural Maryland are protesting plans to convert a warehouse into an ICE detention facility. The ACLU of Maryland has criticized the process as secretive and lawless.

Eighty-six human rights organizations sent a letter to Congress urging them not to send Cubans fleeing the US fuel blockade to Guantánamo. The US military has threatened to detain Cubans there if they flee deteriorating conditions caused by US sanctions.

Tennessee lawmakers passed a fix to the state's school threats law after children were arrested for jokes and misunderstandings. ProPublica reports on the legislative change.

US-Iran conflict escalates with economic and nuclear threats
2 src · 6 it2026-04-10 14:43
Common Dreams · The Real News Network · Common Dreams · Common Dreams · Common Dreams · Common Dreams
▸ sentez / synthesis
ABD-İsrail'in İran'a yönelik askeri kampanyası yoğunlaştı, ABD'de enerji fiyatlarında artışa ve enflasyona neden oldu. Başkan Trump, İran'a yönelik kıyamet benzeri tehditlerde bulunarak nükleer tırmanma ve Buşehr reaktörüne olası hasar konusunda endişeleri artırdı. Çatışma ortamında işgücü piyasasında dalgalanma görülüyor.
The US-Israeli military campaign against Iran has intensified, causing energy price spikes and inflation in the US. President Trump has made apocalyptic threats against Iran, raising concerns about nuclear escalation and potential damage to the Bushehr reactor. The labor market shows volatility amid the conflict.

MintPress News reports that the Iranian Jewish Association described Israel as an 'ominous Zionist regime' after Israeli airstrikes destroyed a historic synagogue in Tehran on Passover.

The Grayzone: Trump Beyaz Sarayı İran Savaşı Manifestosunu İntihal Etti
The Grayzone Reports Trump White House Plagiarized Iran War Manifesto
1 src · 1 it2026-03-20 23:49neutral
The Grayzone
▸ sentez / synthesis
The Grayzone, Trump Beyaz Sarayı'nın İran'a saldırma gerekçesini, Tahran'la savaşı teşvik eden ve İsrail'in imajını güçlendirmek için kurulan bir düşünce kuruluşu olan Demokrasileri Savunma Vakfı'ndan intihal ettiğini bildiriyor.
The Grayzone reports that the Trump White House plagiarized its justification for attacking Iran from the Foundation for the Defense of Democracies, a think tank that promotes war with Tehran and was founded to enhance Israel's image.
The Grayzone: İsrail Savunma Kuvvetleri Rus Liderleri Tehdit Etti
The Grayzone Reports IDF Threatened Elimination of Russian Leaders
1 src · 1 it2026-03-18 16:54neutral
The Grayzone
▸ sentez / synthesis
The Grayzone, İsrail askeri sözcüsü Anna Ukolova'nın 'İsrail'e kötülük dileyen' Rus liderleri yok etmekle tehdit ettiğini ve Moskova'da öfkeye yol açtığını bildiriyor. Tehdit, Rus medyasının İsrail tarafından kullanılan güvenlik açıkları konusunda uyarıda bulunmasının ardından geldi.
The Grayzone reports that Israeli military spokeswoman Anna Ukolova threatened elimination of Russian leaders who 'wish Israel ill,' drawing outrage in Moscow. The threat came after Russian media warned about vulnerabilities exploited by Israel.
İran ABD dolarına meydan okuyor, petrol satışlarında yuan talep ediyor
Iran challenges US dollar, demands oil sales in yuan
1 src · 1 it2026-03-18 04:00
Geopolitical Economy Report
▸ sentez / synthesis
Geopolitical Economy Report, İran'ın Trump'ın savaşına yanıt olarak asimetrik taktikler kullandığını, ABD şirketlerini ve dolar hakimiyetini hedef aldığını, petrol satışlarının Çin yuanı üzerinden yapılmasını talep ettiğini bildiriyor.
Geopolitical Economy Report reports that Iran is using asymmetric tactics in response to Trump's war, targeting US corporations and dollar dominance, demanding oil sales be conducted in Chinese yuan.
Soğuk Savaş İki ortamında Arktik askerileşmesi artıyor
Arctic militarization increases amid Cold War Two
1 src · 1 it2026-03-15 10:53
Geopolitical Economy Report
▸ sentez / synthesis
Geopolitical Economy Report, askerileşmenin Arktik'i barışçıl bir bölgeden ABD emperyal hırsıyla Soğuk Savaş İki'de bir cepheye dönüştürdüğünü bildiriyor.
Geopolitical Economy Report reports that militarization is transforming the Arctic from a peaceful region into a front in Cold War Two, driven by US imperial ambition.
The Grayzone: İsrail ve FBI, İran'la Savaşı Kışkırtmak İçin Suikast Planlarını Manipüle Etti
The Grayzone Reports Israel and FBI Manipulated Assassination Plots to Push War With Iran
1 src · 1 it2026-03-06 21:15neutral
The Grayzone
▸ sentez / synthesis
The Grayzone, FBI'ın Trump'ı İran'ın kendisini öldürmek istediğine ikna etmek için komplolar uydurduğunu, İsrail ve yönetimindeki müttefiklerinin ise onu savaş yolunda tutmak için korkularını kullandığını bildiriyor.
The Grayzone reports that the FBI fabricated plots to convince Trump that Iran sought to assassinate him, while Israel and allies within his administration exploited his fears to keep him on a path to war.
Grayzone, İsrail ve FBI'ın Trump'ı İran savaşına itmek için suikast planlarını manipüle ettiğini bildirdi
Grayzone reports Israel and FBI manipulated assassination plots to goad Trump into Iran war
1 src · 1 it2026-03-06 16:26neutral
The Grayzone
▸ sentez / synthesis
Grayzone, FBI'ın Başkan Trump'ı İran'ın kendisini öldürmek istediğine ikna etmek için planlar uydurduğunu, İsrail ve yönetim müttefiklerinin ise Trump'ın korkularını savaş için kullandığını bildirdi. Haber, Trump'ın bu manipüle edilmiş anlatılara dayanarak saldırıları onayladığını iddia ediyor.
The Grayzone reports that the FBI manufactured plots to convince President Trump that Iran sought to kill him, while Israel and its administration allies exploited Trump's fears to push for war. The report claims Trump authorized strikes based on these manipulated narratives.
ABD ve İsrail savaşı birden fazla ülkeye yayıyor
US and Israel expand war to multiple countries
1 src · 1 it2026-03-05 13:19
Geopolitical Economy Report
▸ sentez / synthesis
Geopolitical Economy Report, İran'a savaş açtıktan sonra İsrail'in Lübnan'ı işgal ettiğini ve Gazze'yi kuşattığını, ABD'nin ise Kürt militanları silahlandırdığını, Pakistanlı protestocuları vurduğunu, Ekvador'da savaştığını ve İspanya'yı tehdit ettiğini bildiriyor.
Geopolitical Economy Report reports that after launching war on Iran, Israel invaded Lebanon and besieged Gaza, while the US arms Kurdish militants, shoots Pakistani protesters, fights in Ecuador, and threatened Spain.
Grayzone: Epstein, kadını seçkin IDF birimine yerleştirmeye yardım etti
Grayzone: Epstein helped place woman in elite IDF unit
1 src · 1 it2026-03-04 04:41neutral
The Grayzone
▸ sentez / synthesis
Grayzone, e-postaların Jeffrey Epstein'ın İsrail bağlantılarını kullanarak avukatının kızının seçkin bir IDF birimine katılmasına yardım ettiğini gösterdiğini bildirdi. Kadın daha sonra Hillel International'ın yönetim kurulunda görev yaptı ve Epstein tarafından potansiyel 'İsrail için harika bir elçi' olarak tanımlandı.
The Grayzone reports that emails show Jeffrey Epstein used his Israeli connections to help his lawyer's daughter join an elite IDF unit. The woman later served on the board of Hillel International and was described by Epstein as a potential 'fantastic ambassador for Israel'.
ABD-İsrail'in İran savaşı nükleer silahlarla değil emperyalizmle ilgili
US-Israeli war on Iran is about imperialism, not nuclear weapons
1 src · 1 it2026-02-28 14:29
Geopolitical Economy Report
▸ sentez / synthesis
Geopolitical Economy Report, ABD ve İsrail'in var olmayan nükleer silahlar bahanesiyle İran'a karşı bir saldırı savaşı yürüttüğünü ve hedefin rejim değişikliği olduğunu iddia ediyor.
Geopolitical Economy Report claims that the US and Israel are waging a war of aggression against Iran under the pretext of non-existent nuclear weapons, with the goal of regime change.
Analiz: Küresel Düzeni Şekillendirmede ABD Tek Kutupluluğu ve Çin Çok Kutupluluğu
Analysis: US Unipolarity vs China's Multipolarity in Shaping Global Order
1 src · 1 it2026-02-26 08:48
Geopolitical Economy Report
▸ sentez / synthesis
Jeopolitik Ekonomi Raporu'ndan bir analiz, ABD ve Çin'in küresel düzen vizyonlarını karşılaştırıyor ve ABD'nin sömürgeciliği canlandırmaya çalıştığını, Çin'in ise barış ve egemen eşitliğe dayalı çok kutuplu bir düzen istediğini savunuyor.
An analysis from Geopolitical Economy Report compares US and Chinese visions for the global order, arguing that the US seeks to revive colonialism while China wants a multipolar order based on peace and sovereign equality.
Grayzone: NED lideri, İran operasyonlarıyla övündükten sonra Kongre'de susturuldu
Grayzone: NED leader cut off in Congress after boasting of Iran operations
1 src · 1 it2026-02-24 20:11neutral
The Grayzone
▸ sentez / synthesis
Grayzone, Ulusal Demokrasi Vakfı başkanı Damon Wilson'ın, İran'a 200 Starlink terminali göndermek ve medya için İran karşıtı anlatılar oluşturmakla övündükten sonra bir Meclis komitesi oturumunda susturulduğunu bildirdi. Haber, NED'in çabalarını İran'da huzursuzluk çıkarmaya yönelik agresif girişimler olarak tanımlıyor.
The Grayzone reports that National Endowment for Democracy president Damon Wilson was cut off during a House committee hearing after boasting of deploying 200 Starlink terminals to Iran and fashioning anti-Iran narratives for the media. The report describes NED's efforts as aggressive attempts to spark unrest in Iran.
12 Nisan'da Napolyon hakkında sosyal medya paylaşımı
Social media post about Napoleon on April 12
1 src · 1 it2025-04-12 23:28
Empire Files (Abby Martin)
▸ sentez / synthesis
Empire Files, 12 Nisan'da Napolyon, tarih, savaş ve orduya atıfta bulunan bir sosyal medya mesajı yayınladı.
Empire Files posted a social media message referencing Napoleon, history, war, and military on April 12.
Diktatörler ve destekçileri için cezasızlığın sonu
An End to Impunity for Dictators and Their Backers
1 src · 1 it2016-06-02 16:55
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Amy Goodman ve Denis Moynihan'ın Democracy Now! makalesi, on yıllar önce iktidar olan ve ABD destekli iki acımasız diktatörün, Çadlı Hissene Habre de dahil, iktidardayken işledikleri suçlardan mahkum edildiğini bildiriyor.
A Democracy Now! article by Amy Goodman and Denis Moynihan reports that two brutal, U.S.-backed dictators who ruled decades ago were convicted for crimes committed while in power, including Hissene Habre of Chad.
Dave Zirin ve Jules Boykoff, 2016 Rio Olimpiyatları ve Brezilya siyasetini tartışıyor
Dave Zirin and Jules Boykoff discuss 2016 Rio Olympics and Brazil's politics
1 src · 1 it2016-06-01 20:39
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Democracy Now! makalesi, yazarlar Dave Zirin ve Jules Boykoff ile 2016 Rio Olimpiyatları ve Brezilya'nın çöken siyasi sistemi hakkında bir söyleşi sunuyor.
A Democracy Now! article features a conversation with authors Dave Zirin and Jules Boykoff about the 2016 Rio Olympics and Brazil's collapsing political system.
Hiroşima kurbanı, Obama'yı yeni nükleer silahları desteklemekle eleştiriyor
Hiroshima survivor criticizes Obama for pushing new nuclear weapons
1 src · 1 it2016-05-27 17:53
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Democracy Now! makalesi, Hiroşima'dan kurtulan Setsuko Thurlow ile yapılan genişletilmiş bir röportajı içeriyor; Thurlow, Başkan Obama'yı yeni nükleer silahları desteklemekle eleştiriyor ve dünyanın uyanması çağrısında bulunuyor.
A Democracy Now! article features an extended interview with Hiroshima survivor Setsuko Thurlow, who criticizes President Obama for pushing new nuclear weapons and calls for the world to wake up.
Barış aktivisti ve Holokost'tan kurtulan Hedy Epstein 91 yaşında öldü
Peace activist and Holocaust survivor Hedy Epstein dies at 91
1 src · 1 it2016-05-27 15:43
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Democracy Now! makalesi, Holokost'tan kurtulan ve barış aktivisti Hedy Epstein'ın 91 yaşında öldüğünü bildiriyor. Epstein Almanya'da doğdu, Kindertransport ile kaçtı ve daha sonra Nürnberg davalarında çalıştı.
A Democracy Now! article reports that Holocaust survivor and peace activist Hedy Epstein has died at age 91. Epstein was born in Germany, escaped on a Kindertransport, and later worked at the Nuremberg trials.
İç Güvenlik Bakanı Jeh Johnson lise gözaltını yeni bir seviyeye taşıyor
Homeland Security Secretary Jeh Johnson takes high-school detention to new level
1 src · 1 it2016-05-26 14:03
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Amy Goodman ve Denis Moynihan'ın Democracy Now! makalesi, Kuzey Karolina, Durham'da bir lise öğrencisinin ICE ajanları tarafından tutuklanıp gözaltına alındığını ve İç Güvenlik Bakanı Jeh Johnson'ı eleştirdiğini bildiriyor.
A Democracy Now! article by Amy Goodman and Denis Moynihan reports that a high school student in Durham, North Carolina, was arrested by ICE agents and detained, criticizing Homeland Security Secretary Jeh Johnson.
Amy Goodman MetroFocus'ta 2016 seçimlerinin medyadaki yansımalarını tartışıyor
Amy Goodman on MetroFocus discusses media coverage of Election 2016
1 src · 1 it2016-05-25 15:37
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Democracy Now! makalesi, Amy Goodman'ın PBS programı MetroFocus'a katılarak 2016 seçimlerinin medyadaki yansımalarının yanlışlıklarını tartıştığını duyuruyor.
A Democracy Now! article announces that Amy Goodman appeared on PBS show MetroFocus to discuss what is wrong with media coverage of Election 2016.

Amy Goodman on NPR's Weekend Edition discusses Bernie Sanders

▸ sentez / synthesis
Democracy Now! makalesi, Amy Goodman'ın NPR'nin Weekend Edition programına katıldığını ve Scott Simon'ın Bernie Sanders'ın Demokratik adaylığı kazanma şansını sorduğunu duyuruyor.
A Democracy Now! article announces that Amy Goodman appeared on NPR's Weekend Edition, where Scott Simon asked about Bernie Sanders' chances of claiming the Democratic nomination.

Breaking Free: A rising tide of climate resistance
1 src · 1 it2016-05-19 14:45
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Amy Goodman ve Denis Moynihan'ın Democracy Now! makalesi, Fort McMurray yangınlarını ve iklim direnişi hareketini, Alberta katran kumlarına odaklanarak ele alıyor.
A Democracy Now! article by Amy Goodman and Denis Moynihan discusses the Fort McMurray wildfires and the climate resistance movement, focusing on the Alberta tar sands.
Chomsky, Cumhuriyetçi Parti'yi insanlık tarihinin en tehlikeli örgütü olarak nitelendirdi
Chomsky calls GOP most dangerous organization in human history
1 src · 1 it2016-05-16 16:50
Democracy Now!
▸ sentez / synthesis
Democracy Now! ile yaptığı röportajda Noam Chomsky, Suriye çatışması, IŞİD'in yükselişi, Suudi Arabistan, Brezilya'daki siyasi kriz ve diğer konuları ele alarak bugünkü Cumhuriyetçi Parti'yi insanlık tarihinin en tehlikeli örgütü adayı olarak nitelendirdi.
In an interview with Democracy Now!, Noam Chomsky discussed the conflict in Syria, the rise of ISIS, Saudi Arabia, the political crisis in Brazil, and other topics, calling today's GOP a candidate for the most dangerous organization in human history.
